title: Valentines 2024 — no Valentine, Sam dopamine, releasing love-pressure
html:
Valentines 2024 — no Valentine, Sam dopamine, releasing love-pressure

Source: 2024-02-15 Google Doc. Stream-of-consciousness Valentine's Day reflection. Yahir is 21, no Valentine, in early-stage interest in Sam Solum, thinking about love-without-titles.

TL;DR

  • The setup: Valentine's Day, Owen and Ayden have valentines, the rest of the house doesn't. "To Kyle it is slightly devastating." Yahir notes he's never had a Valentine before besides "vague middle school gestures."
  • The didn't-text-her move: didn't wish Sam happy Valentine's because "that would be too cliche." Frames it as not wanting to be committed because of the title — only because of genuine connectivity. "I dont want to feel committed because of the name, but rather because of the connectivity that comes from both of our presence."
  • The Jo lesson reflected on: "I kind of experienced this with Jo, where I was over indexing with gifts and attention, because I was HER boyfriend and thought that I needed to prove that." Title-driven obligation as performance trap.
  • The Fleetwood Mac moment: while writing, "Landslide" is playing — lyric about building a life around someone. Yahir doesn't have that yearn right now, but has tried to manifest it.
  • The 2024 goals self-audit: at the bottom of his 2024 goals list is "continue the mysterious journey of finding love." Yahir realizes he's subconsciously releasing pressure on the love search. Not putting weight on it, hoping it happens organically.
  • The riley-quote turned inward: "closed mouths don't get fed" — what Yahir told Riley earlier; now applying to himself. You have to be bold and stick your neck out.
  • On Sam, honestly: "Im not gonna lie and say that Sam isnt consistently on my mind bc she is. My mind looks forward to the dopamine hit of her snapchats." But explicitly "Im not head over heels." Recognizes the dynamic as "excited for a hot girl to be into me and that I'm into her" — not the falling-in-love yearn.
  • Plan: visit Dave in Idaho on Friday. Tomorrow, invite Sam out — "just to vibe."

Pattern observed

This is the earliest crisp Sam-doc in the corpus — predates the April escalation doc by 10 weeks. Already shows the pattern Yahir will later apply to Emily: dopamine from messages, "she's into me, I'm into her, but no head-over-heels," self-described release of pressure on outcome. Then 2 months later he's all-in.

The Jo-overindexing-on-gifts confession is a useful self-diagnostic — Yahir distrusts title-driven performance in himself, not just in others. Same anti-performance instinct shows up in the "have you made yourself into a concept" meta-doubt.

Worth flagging: the "stream of consciousness documentation" framing is itself a recurring genre tag Yahir applies to his own thoughts-and-things docs — meta-aware that he's doing journaling, not just venting.

Key quotes

  • "I dont want to feel committed because of the name, but rather because of the connectivity that comes from both of our presence."
  • "closed mouths don't get fed" (told to Riley, applied to self)
  • "My mind looks forward to the dopamine hit of her snapchats."

Open questions

  • Riley — recurring friend (UO/Eugene orbit)? Single-mention here.
  • Kyle — housemate, slightly devastated by Valentine's. Same as existing kyle.md?
  • Did Yahir actually invite Sam out the next day? (Per April doc: pursuit clearly continued.)
